inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the IRA account holder. Must be at least 70.5 for QCD eligibility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the IRA account holder. Must be at least 70.5 for QCD eligibility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRA hesap sahibinin yaşı. QCD uygunluğu için en az 70,5 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des IRA-Kontoinhabers. Muss mindestens 70,5 Jahre betragen für die QCD-Berechtigung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du titulaire du compte IRA. Doit être d'au moins 70,5 ans pour être éligible au QCD.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del titular de la cuenta IRA. Debe ser al menos 70.5 para ser elegible para QCD.

inputs.label: Distribution Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount intended for charitable distribution directly from IRA (max $100,000 per year).

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount intended for charitable distribution directly from IRA (max $100,000 per year).
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRA'dan doğrudan hayır amaçlı dağıtım için amaçlanan tutar (yılda maksimum 100.000 $).
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, der für eine gemeinnützige Spende direkt von der IRA bestimmt ist (max. 100.000 $ pro Jahr).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant destiné à une distribution caritative directe depuis l'IRA (max 100 000 $ par an).
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto destinado a distribución caritativa directamente desde IRA (máximo $100,000 por año).

inputs.label: Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your top marginal income tax rate, used to estimate tax savings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your top marginal income tax rate, used to estimate tax savings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi tasarrufunu tahmin etmek için kullanılan en yüksek marjinal gelir vergisi oranınız.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr höchster Grenzsteuersatz für die Einkommensteuer, zur Schätzung der Steuerersparnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre taux marginal d'imposition sur le revenu le plus élevé, utilisé pour estimer les économies d'impôt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Su tasa marginal de impuesto sobre la renta más alta, utilizada para estimar el ahorro fiscal.

inputs.label: IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Total value of your traditional IRA, for reference (RMD computation may apply).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of your traditional IRA, for reference (RMD computation may apply).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geleneksel IRA'nızın toplam değeri, referans amaçlı (RMD hesaplaması uygulanabilir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwert Ihrer traditionellen IRA, als Referenz (RMD-Berechnung kann anwendbar sein).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale de votre IRA traditionnel, pour référence (le calcul du RMD peut s'appliquer).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total de su IRA tradicional, como referencia (puede aplicarse el cálculo de RMD).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
